-{"id":"bd-1prjp","title":"[Maintenance] Wire SIGINT/SIGTERM to drain background jobs + exit","description":"## Scope

- Register process signal handlers (SIGINT/SIGTERM) to initiate drain mode.
- Stop accepting new work:
  - refuse new sessions/jobs
  - stop scheduling periodic cleanup loops
- Wait for drain completion (up to deadline), then exit.

## Notes

- Bun has different process lifecycle semantics than Node; implement with care.
- Prefer a single central place that owns all interval handles so we can stop them deterministically.

## Observability

- Log one structured "shutdown initiated" line and one "shutdown complete" line.
- Include counts: active WS connections, active jobs, pending job queue length.

## Acceptance

- Gateway exits cleanly under SIGINT/SIGTERM with bounded drain time.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T05:15:15.372876205Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T05:16:02.089640832Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["backend","ops"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1prjp","depends_on_id":"bd-1vdtm","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T19:16:20Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1prjp","depends_on_id":"bd-32lz3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T19:16:20Z","created_by":"import"}]}
+{"id":"bd-1prjp","title":"[Maintenance] Wire SIGINT/SIGTERM to drain background jobs + exit","description":"## Scope

- Register process signal handlers (SIGINT/SIGTERM) to initiate drain mode.
- Stop accepting new work:
  - refuse new sessions/jobs
  - stop scheduling periodic cleanup loops
- Wait for drain completion (up to deadline), then exit.

## Notes

- Bun has different process lifecycle semantics than Node; implement with care.
- Prefer a single central place that owns all interval handles so we can stop them deterministically.

## Observability

- Log one structured "shutdown initiated" line and one "shutdown complete" line.
- Include counts: active WS connections, active jobs, pending job queue length.

## Acceptance

- Gateway exits cleanly under SIGINT/SIGTERM with bounded drain time.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T05:15:15.372876205Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T22:25:09.544984045Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T22:25:09.544885752Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["backend","ops"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1prjp","depends_on_id":"bd-1vdtm","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T19:16:20Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1prjp","depends_on_id":"bd-32lz3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T19:16:20Z","created_by":"import"}]}
